mapper.select: /* 마지막 파티션 테이블 이름 조회 : postgresPartitionMapper.getLastPartitionTableName */ select max (child.relname) as last_partition_table_name from pg_inherits inh join pg_class parent on inh.inhparent = parent.oid join pg_class child on inh.inhrelid = child.oid where 1=1 and parent.relname = #{tableName}
mapper.update: /* 파티션 테이블 물리테이블로 분리 : postgresPartitionMapper.detachPartitionTable */ alter table ${tableName} detach partition ${partitionTableName}
/* 파티션 테이블 삭제 : partitionMapper.dropTable */ drop table if exists ${tableName}
